title: Fix a few typos
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Fixes a typo in an error message that codespell spotted.
Cleans up grammar in an error message and a few comments.
Switch to using named values instead of literal strings to compare to instructions.

#### How to verify it

The updated error message required updates to tests that look for the error.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
